{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Executive",
  "description": "Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt,&nbsp;Rivers
Industry:&nbsp;Construction, Marine &amp; Oil &amp; Gas Services

Job Summary


	The Business Development Executive is responsible for identifying new business opportunities, securing contracts, and growing the company&rsquo;s client base across construction, marine, and oil &amp; gas sectors.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities in target sectors
	Develop and maintain relationships with clients, contractors, and industry stakeholders
	Prepare proposals, tenders, and bids for projects
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis
	Support contract negotiation and closing deals
	Achieve monthly and annual revenue targets
	Collaborate with operations teams to ensure project delivery aligns with client expectations
	Maintain a strong pipeline of prospects and opportunities


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Engineering, or related field
	3&ndash;6 years&rsquo; experience in business development (preferably in oil &amp; gas or construction)
	Experience in tendering and contract acquisition
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Knowledge of the local Port Harcourt market


Key Competencies:


	Sales and negotiation
	Networking and relationship management
	Market intelligence
	Communication skills
	Results-driven mindset


Salary
N400,000 / month

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;eandg.tprecruiters@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Business Development Executive - Port Harcourt&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Business Development Executive Job at Excel and Grace Consulting




        
    

        
        Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Industry: Construction, Marine & Oil & Gas Services

Job Summary


	The Business Development Executive is responsible for identifying new business opportunities, securing contracts, and growing the company’s client base across construction, marine, and oil & gas sectors.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities in target sectors
	Develop and maintain relationships with clients, contractors, and industry stakeholders
	Prepare proposals, tenders, and bids for projects
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis
	Support contract negotiation and closing deals
	Achieve monthly and annual revenue targets
	Collaborate with operations teams to ensure project delivery aligns with client expectations
	Maintain a strong pipeline of prospects and opportunities


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Engineering, or related field
	3–6 years’ experience in business development (preferably in oil & gas or construction)
	Experience in tendering and contract acquisition
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Knowledge of the local Port Harcourt market


Key Competencies:


	Sales and negotiation
	Networking and relationship management
	Market intelligence
	Communication skills
	Results-driven mindset


Salary
N400,000 / month

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Business Development Executive - Port Harcourt" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

title: Job Vacancies at Sundry Foods
content:
Sundry Foods is an integrated food services company founded in 2003 and operating in major cities in Nigeria. We are bringing our now trademark great tasting ready-to-eat food and quality services to thousands of people and institutions daily through its chain and network of restaurants, bakeries and other catering facilities.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    





We are proud to own and operate one of Africa’s best restaurant and bakery chains and we pride ourselves on our ability to consistently deliver original food and service solutions whether in workplaces, schools and colleges, hospitals, joining even remote sites and different cultural environments using our team of young seasoned professionals and an entire workforce with a passion to deliver nothing but the best to every customer.



We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:



1.) Unit Accountant


Job Locations: Port Harcourt - Rivers; Benin - Edo; Asaba,  Warri - Delta; Ilorin - Kwara; Onitsha - Anambra; Akure - Ondo; Lagos Mainland (Omole, Mowe, Gbagada, Isheri, Ikeja), Lagos Island (Abraham Adesanya, Sangotedo, Ozumba) - Lagos; Ikot Ekpene, Akwa Ibom; and Mowe - Ogun
Job Status: Full-Time



Responsibilities


	To represent the accounting and treasury functions at the unit level and safeguarding the company’s current assets as well as work that may be assigned to you by the Manager responsible for your primary assignment.


Requirements


	Required Qualification: 1st Degree in Accounting or Banking and Finance (B.Sc or HND) with a second class at a minimum
	Required Skill: Microsoft Excel Skills.


Extras:


	Working knowledge of an Accounting Software or ERP is an added advantage.
	Strong positive attitude.
	Resilient. Self-led and self-motivated.




Application Closing Date: 28th March, 2026.



Click here to apply online


 

2.) Resident Internal Auditor


Job Locations: Abuja, Onitsha - Anambra, Lagos, Benin - Edo, Port Harcourt - Rivers, Asaba - Delta, Abeokuta - Ogun, Ibadan - Oyo
Job Status: Full-Time Staff



Description


	The Resident Internal Auditor will be part of the internal audit team responsible for financial and operational Audits, testing and evaluating controls for adequacy and determining compliance with organizational and regulatory policies and procedures.


The role holder will;


	Perform internal Audit field work.
	Audit of account payables (vetting of invoices with Bin card & security book)
	Observing end of month stock & cash count.
	Vetting of imprest retirement schedule.
	Preparation of weekly audit plan, preparation of weekly activity/audit report to Head of Department.


Requirements


	Required Qualification: B.Sc / HND in Accounting or Equivalent with a minimum of second class
	Required Skill: Fraud prevention techniques, Analytical skills, Reporting writing skills, Excellent communication skills
	Extras: Integrity and High Initiative.




Application Closing Date: 28th March, 2026. 



Click here to apply online


 

3.) Finance Manager


Job Locations: Port Harcourt - Rivers, Owerri - Imo, Lagos Island, Lekki, Ajah, & Sangotedo - Lagos
Job Status: Full-Time



Responsibilities


	Ensure accurate records
	Ensure accounts are updated.


Requirements


	Required Qualification: BSc / HND
	Required Skill: Microsoft Office Suite skills (Word, Excel, Powerpoint, Outlook); Excellent verbal and communication skills; presentation skills; facilitation skills
	Extras: Integrity and High Initiative, Customer relations, Communication.




Application Closing Date: 19th March, 2026.



Click here to apply online

    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cashier",
  "description": "Smart Nuel Communications Limited is a growing mobile technology retail company headquartered in Ikeja Computer Village, Lagos, one of Nigeria&rsquo;s largest technology markets. The company specializes in the sales and distribution of mobile phones and related accessories across major cities in the country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier
Job Locations:&nbsp;Bayelsa, Alaba - Lagos, Aba - Abia, Port Harcourt - Rivers, &amp; Sango Ota - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The cashier is responsible for handling daily cash transactions, maintaining accurate financial records, managing petty cash, and ensuring proper documentation.
	The role requires a high level of integrity, accuracy, and accountability in managing cash, preparing reports, and supporting daily financial operations.


Responsibilities


	Receives cash payments from customers daily
	Posting of cash receipts daily.
	Petty cash handling and disbursement.
	Posting of cash and petty cash transactions on the system daily.
	Sending a daily cash summary/report to the management group.
	Daily custody of the Cheque books and cash balance safekeeping.
	Co-handling of the office entrance key.
	Any other related duty as may be assigned.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE / OND in Accounting, Business Administration, or related field
	Previous experience in cash handling or an accounting role is an advantage
	Basic knowledge of accounting systems or MS Excel is desirable.


Salary
N80,000 / month

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;Jobs.smartnuel@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Cashier&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Cashier Job at Smart Nuel Communications Limited




        
    

        
        Smart Nuel Communications Limited is a growing mobile technology retail company headquartered in Ikeja Computer Village, Lagos, one of Nigeria’s largest technology markets. The company specializes in the sales and distribution of mobile phones and related accessories across major cities in the country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier
Job Locations: Bayelsa, Alaba - Lagos, Aba - Abia, Port Harcourt - Rivers, & Sango Ota - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The cashier is responsible for handling daily cash transactions, maintaining accurate financial records, managing petty cash, and ensuring proper documentation.
	The role requires a high level of integrity, accuracy, and accountability in managing cash, preparing reports, and supporting daily financial operations.


Responsibilities


	Receives cash payments from customers daily
	Posting of cash receipts daily.
	Petty cash handling and disbursement.
	Posting of cash and petty cash transactions on the system daily.
	Sending a daily cash summary/report to the management group.
	Daily custody of the Cheque books and cash balance safekeeping.
	Co-handling of the office entrance key.
	Any other related duty as may be assigned.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE / OND in Accounting, Business Administration, or related field
	Previous experience in cash handling or an accounting role is an advantage
	Basic knowledge of accounting systems or MS Excel is desirable.


Salary
N80,000 / month

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using “Cashier” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: General Manager Job at Excel and Grace Consulting

  "title": "General Manager",
  "description": "Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Construction, Marine &amp; Oil &amp; Gas Services

Job Summary


	The General Manager will provide strategic leadership and operational oversight across all business units (construction equipment leasing, marine dredging, and engineering services).
	The role is responsible for driving profitability, ensuring operational efficiency, and expanding market presence within Nigeria&rsquo;s infrastructure and oil &amp; gas sectors.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute business strategies to achieve revenue and growth targets.
	Oversee daily operations across construction, marine, and engineering divisions.
	Drive business expansion initiatives, including entry into new markets (e.g., Lagos).
	Manage key client relationships, especially in oil &amp; gas and infrastructure sectors.
	Ensure optimal utilization and maintenance of company equipment and assets.
	Lead financial planning, budgeting, and cost control initiatives.
	Ensure compliance with regulatory, safety, and environmental standards.
	Supervise and mentor senior management and departmental heads.
	Identify new business opportunities, partnerships, and contracts.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Engineering, Business Administration, or related field (MBA is an advantage).
	10 -15 years of experience in construction, marine, or oil &amp; gas services.
	Proven leadership and business management experience.
	Strong understanding of equipment leasing, dredging, and Engineering services.
	Excellent financial and strategic planning skills.
	Strong network within the Nigerian oil &amp; gas or infrastructure sector.


Key Competencies:


	Leadership &amp; decision-making.
	Strategic thinking.
	Client relationship management.
	Financial acumen.
	Operational excellence.


Salary
N800,000 - N900,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;eandg.tprecruiters@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;General Manager - Port Harcourt&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

General Manager Job at Excel and Grace Consulting




        
    

        
        Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Construction, Marine & Oil & Gas Services

Job Summary


	The General Manager will provide strategic leadership and operational oversight across all business units (construction equipment leasing, marine dredging, and engineering services).
	The role is responsible for driving profitability, ensuring operational efficiency, and expanding market presence within Nigeria’s infrastructure and oil & gas sectors.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute business strategies to achieve revenue and growth targets.
	Oversee daily operations across construction, marine, and engineering divisions.
	Drive business expansion initiatives, including entry into new markets (e.g., Lagos).
	Manage key client relationships, especially in oil & gas and infrastructure sectors.
	Ensure optimal utilization and maintenance of company equipment and assets.
	Lead financial planning, budgeting, and cost control initiatives.
	Ensure compliance with regulatory, safety, and environmental standards.
	Supervise and mentor senior management and departmental heads.
	Identify new business opportunities, partnerships, and contracts.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Business Administration, or related field (MBA is an advantage).
	10 -15 years of experience in construction, marine, or oil & gas services.
	Proven leadership and business management experience.
	Strong understanding of equipment leasing, dredging, and Engineering services.
	Excellent financial and strategic planning skills.
	Strong network within the Nigerian oil & gas or infrastructure sector.


Key Competencies:


	Leadership & decision-making.
	Strategic thinking.
	Client relationship management.
	Financial acumen.
	Operational excellence.


Salary
N800,000 - N900,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "General Manager - Port Harcourt" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Communications Manager Job at Duob Recruitment
content:
Duob Recruitment, a recruitment firm, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Communications Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Communications Manager leads the planning, development, and execution of communication strategies that strengthen portfolio companies brand reputation, visibility, and stakeholder engagement across all business units. T
	he role oversees internal and external communications, public relations, digital media, content development, branding, and corporate storytelling.
	The ideal candidate is a strong strategist and storyteller who can translate complex, multi-sector work into clear, impactful messages that enhance the Group’s credibility and influence.


Key Responsibilities
Corporate Communications & Public Relations:


	Develop and implement integrated communication strategies aligned with the groups mission and business objectives.
	Manage media relations, press releases, interviews, and public statements.
	Build strong relationships with media houses, journalists, influencers, and external partners.


Brand Management & Visibility:


	Strengthen and maintain consistent brand identity across allsubsidiaries (Agro, Energy, Advisory, Capital, etc.).
	Oversee production of branded materials, corporate documents, and marketing assets.
	Ensure high-quality representation of the Group at events, conferences, and stakeholder engagements.


Digital & Social Media Management:


	Lead content strategy and management across social media platforms, website, newsletters, and online campaigns.
	Oversee creation of engaging content—articles, videos, graphics, reports, and human-interest stories.
	Track and analyze digital performance metrics to improve reach and engagement.


Internal Communications:


	Develop communication channels that support collaboration and alignment across theGroup teams and departments.
	Coordinate internal announcements, employee updates, and organizational messaging.


Strategic Support to Leadership:


	Prepare speeches, presentations, briefs, and communication materials for executives.
	Provide communication guidance during major projects, events, partnerships, and organizational changes.
	Support crisis communication and reputation management efforts.


Monitoring, Reporting & Continuous Improvement:


	Track brand visibility, media coverage, and campaign performance.
	Produce communication reports, insights, and recommendations for leadership.
	Implement communication best practices and stay updated with industry trends.


Required Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree in Communications, Public Relations, Mass Communication, Marketing, or related field.
	5 - 8 years of experience in communications, PR, media, marketing, or corporate affairs.
	Master’s Degree is an added advantage.
	Proven experience managing corporate communication in a multi-sector or high-impact organization.
	Strong writing, editing, storytelling, and presentation skills.
	Experience developing and executing digital content strategies.
	Familiarity with design tools (Canva, Adobe Suite) is a plus.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
